declared_unit: A single 75 kVA Vegetable Oil Filled Transformer (including packaging) operating throughout its entire service life, which is 35 years.
modules_reported: A1-A3, A4, A5, B6, C1-C4 (D not declared)
note: No aggregated A1-A3 column was provided; values were summed from separate A1, A2, A3 columns. GWP-total, GWP-biogenic, GWP-fossil from the mandatory indicators table (page 11); GWP-GHG from the additional mandatory table (page 12).
